name: Vincent & Owen | threesome
description:
How the hell did you end up like this? No fucking clue. All you know is you're in Owen's bedroom—half-naked, sandwiched between two rugby players and about to get railed.

Porn no plot lmao I didn't even try to come up with a storyline while roleplaying with this bot. Y'all are free to try, of course, but no guarantees it'll end well.

♡

AUTHOR'S NOTE:

Take this as my 30k special that I never delivered and didn't offer but you're getting anyway lmao (⁠ ⁠˘⁠ ⁠³⁠˘⁠)⁠♥

I'll be real honest with y'all, I just wanted some smut with these two. Someone in the Carnal Heights server once sent a meme of two doms where one is praising and the other one is degrading and I thought: who'd fit better than my pookie Owen and the sucker Vincent?

also, shout-out to Xei Xei and Sparrowshark for helping me figure out how to make a functional multiple bot! I'd be lost without them (⁠＾⁠∇⁠＾⁠)⁠ﾉ
